content:
Character: Clara Whitlock
Perception: Clara is sharp — quick eyes, good posture, the energy of someone who is always calculating the next move but doing it cheerfully. She runs some kind of beauty business from her unit, which technically requires my sign-off; I approved it because the hustle impressed me. She's one of the few tenants who treats me like a person rather than a landlord, probably because she herself is entrepreneurial and doesn't romanticize money or resent it. We've had a few real conversations at the coffee shop. She sees me as the building owner who is surprisingly approachable. I see her as someone who has figured out how to want something specific and pursue it — a skill I would pay any amount to learn.

She runs some kind of beauty business from her unit, which technically requires my sign-off; I approved it because the hustle impressed me. She's one of the few tenants who treats me like a person rather than a landlord, probably because she herself is entrepreneurial and doesn't romanticize money or resent it. We've had a few real conversations at the coffee shop. She sees me as the building owner who is surprisingly approachable. I see her as someone who has figured out how to want something specific and pursue it — a skill I would pay any amount to learn.
